text: I can't log into my account even after resetting the password. It keeps saying my username is incorrect.

hey, my app keeps crashing when I try to open it after the last update. I’ve tried uninstalling but still no luck.

Hello, I’m reaching out because I seem to have been incorrectly billed for a service I no longer use. Several charges appeared on my statement that don't make sense to me, and I’d appreciate it if someone could look into this and possibly initiate a refund for those transactions. Unfortunately, I don't have all the details on hand, but I can provide further information if necessary.
I'm having trouble accessing my account. I can’t seem to log in, and the reset link isn't working. Can you help me restore access?
I updated my billing info but now my subscription says expired. What’s up with that?

I recently sent in a request for a refund due to a billing issue that seemed to come out of nowhere. One moment I was being charged one amount, and the next it jumped significantly without any prior notice. I thought I had opted in for a different plan, and now I’m confused about what’s happening. Can someone clarify the situation for me? The lack of communication on this has made it really hard to trust the process, and I feel like I’m getting mixed messages regarding my options here. I just want to resolve this and hopefully get my money back.

I really didn't expect this! The service was great at first, but now I seem to be getting all the wrong updates. It's like I'm stuck in some weird loop. Can someone look into it? It's kinda making me think twice about sticking around.

I’ve been having a really annoying issue with my account, like, I can't seem to get my old messages back and it’s super frustrating because I need them for something important. I've tried everything I can think of but nothing's working right. What can I do to retrieve them? I'm not sure if I even have the right settings, honestly. Any help would be appreciated!

Hey, quick question! How do I change my account email? Just want to make sure I’m doing it right.
